name: Catfish Vera Cruzana
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the fillets in a baking pan and pour the white wine and lemon juice over the tops.
2. Bake at 475°F for 6 - 8 minutes, or until the fish flakes. Reserve the wine/lemon sauce.
3. Combine the remaining ingredients (except cheese) and spoon onto each fillet.
4. Top each fillet with cheese; bake at 500°F until the cheese melts and begins to brown.
5. Serve the wine sauce with the fish.
